residual_risks.risk: Vite build reports one large JavaScript chunk.
residual_risks.mitigation: Recorded in build log; future stage should consider code splitting if product scale increases.

residual_risks.risk: BFF smoke server is local seeded acceptance infrastructure.
residual_risks.mitigation: Bounded review only; no production readiness claim.

residual_risks.risk: Initial E2E attempt failed when preview proxy pointed to a stale port.
residual_risks.mitigation: Proxy was corrected to 127.0.0.1:18041; final CDP, network logs and validation command log passed.
